name: Cantaloupe Jam
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Cantaloupe, cut into pieces the size of your thumb
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut cantaloupe into pieces the size of your thumb.
2. Combine with drained crushed pineapple, 2 oranges, their peeling ground with the peelings, and all.
3. Add 2 packages pectin. Add sugar; measure and add an equal amount of sugar as you have fruit.
4. Cook until a thick syrup forms.
5. Pour into bottles and seal.
